title: Missing Column for other owner
excerpt:
i am an owner of a board. i created a column. i added owners into that board. 
one column is not visible in to one of the owners. 
what could be the issue here? thanks 
  
Link to Contacts v3 column is not visible to ris…

posts.author: TiMo (Timothy Dipuatdo)
posts.cookedHtml:
i am an owner of a board. i created a column. i added owners into that board.
one column is not visible in to one of the owners.

what could be the issue here? thanks

image1375×619 117 KB

Link to Contacts v3 column is not visible to risk manager

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml: Which column is not visible? Is it your mirror column? If so, make sure that the same people have ownership status on the board that is mirrored on your Scheduled Calls board.

posts.author: stephITPM (Stephanie)
posts.cookedHtml: Your risk manager must be either a member of your Contacts v3 board, OR if the Contacts v3 board is a main board, then they at least need to be a member of the workspace where it lives.

posts.author: TiMo (Timothy Dipuatdo)
posts.cookedHtml:
that exactly is the issue, we are both owners of the 2 boards

and Risk Officer is actually Owner of the Workspace where those 2 boards are located.

posts.author: TiMo (Timothy Dipuatdo)
posts.cookedHtml: Screenshot 2024-04-19 232337478×504 23.5 KB

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve had this issue before - try restricting your column and adding them to the column permissions.

posts.author: ShanaB (Shana Blackstone)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m having this same issue! We are both owners of the board as well. We can’t see lik Did you find an answer to this from monday?

She can see this, which she added:

image1463×421 75.5 KB

But my view looks like this:

image874×755 28.9 KB

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml: One thing you can try that worked for me was restricting view permissions on the mirror columns by clicking the 3 dot menu, hover over Settings, then select Restrict column view and make sure that al the board admins are in the list that shows up. Sometimes this extra step allows for the columns to become visible.
